SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALIMAS THOMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN JEUNG STORE MANAGER. DEFENDANT THIRD EYE SECURITY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHARLEY LARRY CEO. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-22-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS, ALIMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALGREEN CO. THIRD EYE SECURITY $6,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,400.00, WALGREENS CO. AND THIRD EYE SECURITY ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY RESPONSIBLE FOR PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF. COURT GRANTS DAMAGES AS FOLLOWS: TRANSPORTATION, TOLL, PARKING, $225; OVER THE COUNTER MEDICATIONS $775; LOSS OF WAGES $3400; PAIN AND SUFFERING $2000. NO DIAGNOSES OF NATURE OF PHYSICAL INJURY WAS PROVIDED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Jodie Steinberg for Appellant, Defendant Third Eye Security/Charley Larry the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Alimas Thomas the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Attorney Jodie Steinberg for Appellant, Defendant Third Eye Security/Charley Larry testifies on his behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
#1:Video of incendet on CD.
#2:Email from Alimas Thomas regarding right hand.
#3:Email from Alimas Thomas regarding left hand.

Attorney Jodie Steinberg cross examines Respondent, Plaintiff Alimas Thomas.
Attorney Jodie Steinberg for Appellant, Defendant Third Eye Security/Charley Larry plays video of incident for the court.

Respondent, Plaintiff Alimas Thomas testifies on her own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
A:Letters from School District.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Judgment Entered
